title:
NZ Postcode Shape files
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## NZ Postcode Shape files
I am studying Post Grad Diploma of GIS at Massy University, so for educational purpose I need  NZ Postcode Shape files for spatial analysis please
.zip file must contain at least the .shp, .shx, .dbf, and .prj files components of the shapefile.

#### Likely Source Agency
